heading: Licenses of masters or mates as pilots
label: 7112 Licenses of masters or mates as pilots
text: A master or mate licensed under this part who also qualifies as a pilot is not required to hold 2 licenses. Instead, the qualification of the master or mate as pilot shall be endorsed on the master’s or mate’s license.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource section (U.S. Code)711246:230Section 7112 provides for the endorsement of a master’s or mate’s license as a pilot if they meet those specifications. These individuals do not have to hold two separate licenses.
